sentences.arabic: الدُّعَاءُ عِبَادَةٌ عَظِيمَةٌ وَهُوَ مُخُّ الْعِبَادَةِ كَمَا قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ [رَوَاهُ التِّرْمِذِيُّ، وَحَسَّنَهُ الْأَلْبَانِيُّ].
sentences.translation: Dova je velika ibadet i srž ibadeta, kako je rekao Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem [Bilježi Tirmizi, a dobrim ga ocijenio Albani].
sentences.translationEn: Du'a (supplication) is a great act of worship and the very essence of worship, as the Prophet, peace be upon him, said [Narrated by al-Tirmidhi, graded hasan by al-Albani].

sentences.arabic: يَدُلُّ الدُّعَاءُ عَلَى افْتِقَارِ الْعَبْدِ إِلَى اللَّهِ وَاعْتِرَافِهِ بِضَعْفِهِ.
sentences.translation: Dova ukazuje na to da je rob ovisan o Allahu i da priznaje svoju slabost.
sentences.translationEn: Du'a shows a servant's dependence on Allah and their acknowledgement of their weakness.

sentences.arabic: وَاللَّهُ يُحِبُّ أَنْ يَسْأَلَهُ عِبَادُهُ وَيَكْرَهُ أَنْ يَسْتَغْنِيَ أَحَدٌ عَنْهُ.
sentences.translation: Allah voli da Ga Njegovi robovi mole i mrzi da Mu se neko smatra nepotrebnim.
sentences.translationEn: Allah loves that His servants ask of Him and dislikes that anyone feels independent of Him.

sentences.arabic: وَأَفْضَلُ أَوْقَاتِ الدُّعَاءِ آخِرُ اللَّيْلِ وَبَيْنَ الْأَذَانِ وَالْإِقَامَةِ.
sentences.translation: Najbolja vremena za dovu su posljednji dio noći i između ezana i ikameta.
sentences.translationEn: The best times for du'a are the last part of the night and between the adhan and iqamah.

sentences.arabic: وَالدَّرْسُ أَنَّ الْمُسْلِمَ يَلْجَأُ إِلَى اللَّهِ بِالدُّعَاءِ فِي كُلِّ أَمْرٍ صَغِيرٍ أَوْ كَبِيرٍ.
sentences.translation: Pouka je da musliman pribjegava Allahu dovom u svakoj stvari, maloj ili velikoj.
sentences.translationEn: The lesson is that a Muslim turns to Allah in supplication in every matter, great or small.
